blocker: Tier-A propagate() does not yet consume observation.alerting/buried_under, so the noisy variant is reward-invariant and schema-valid but behaviorally latent on the fast sim until the observation/tool layer is wired (out of scope: requires shared-core edit).
one_line: Built a reusable noisy-metrics transform (alerting=noisy, monitoring_degrades=True, deeper buried_under, injected observes edge) per the assertion schema + a validated example variant from scenario #55; 7 pytest pass and the official sim.spec validator accepts it.
